name: Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Limited
summary: Bombay Super Hybrid Seeds Limited engages in the research, production, processing, and marketing of hybrid agricultural seeds in India. It offers seeds of wheat, onion, groundnut, gram, bajra, coriander, fenugreek, beetroot, gum guar, black gram, sesame, guar, green gram, carrot, Lucerne, cumin, jowar, isabgol, mustard, toor, soybean, fennel, limabean, rajka bajri, chilly, brinjal, bhindi, ridge gourd, sponge gourd, bitter gourd, cauliflower, cucumber, cabbage, peas, tomato, papaya, watermelon, raddish and drumstick seeds. The company offers its seeds under the Kasturi and Bombay Super brands. It also imports and exports its seeds. The company was founded in 1983 and is based in Rajkot, India.
